properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v4 v6

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Looking at the world around me Everyone is searching for a key One that makes them, truly happy All they want is to be free from this life’s miseries, something certain from all these uncertainties There’s a call to answer A commitment to be done And He needs people more than one

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I will go inspire, teach and serve Tell the people around the world Share of Him as He deserves Let the truth be unfurled And i will imitate the Master’s example And lift His name sublime It’s time

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Look at the world around you There so many things we need to do I’m gonna do it all for Him, will you? Together we will answer The commitment to be done Because together we are one in the Son

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: We’ll go inspire, teach and serve Tell the people around the world Share of Him as He deserves Let the truth be unfurled And we will imitate the Master’s example To lift His name sublime It’s time

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: So much to do, so all will know To be free, He is the remedy

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: We will imitate the Master’s example To lift His name sublime It’s time It’s time It’s time
